source: Kaggle T4 run; transcribed from cell-5 summary. Command in notebooks/m2_harder_tasks_kaggle.py (cell 4).
question: Which direction is the start from here?
note: DIRECTION question (8-way compass home). exact ON 71-78% (within-1 ~90%) is HIGH and FLAT across length incl. 3x extrapolation — direction-home is scale-invariant, so a length-invariant cortex reads it at any path length. cortex OFF at chance (12-18%) => the LLM answers ~4x above chance purely through the spatial channel.
